headline: Why Brown & Brown (BRO) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again
summary: Brown & Brown (BRO) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

raw.headline: Why Brown & Brown (BRO) is Poised to Beat Earnings Estimates Again

headline: Can Marsh Navigate Through Rising Costs in Q1 Earnings?
summary: MRSH is set to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 16, with EPS expected to rise 4.9% and revenues 4.6%. But rising operating costs could cloud results.
